title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
summary_full: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.
summary_public: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

FR.label: neutral
FR.evidence: mulls a foray into French politics
